graph_description: The graph shows the infrared absorption spectrum of sodium azide single crystals. The spectra are plotted with wavenumber on the x-axis and intensity on the y-axis. Two different conditions are depicted: one with the (111) direction parallel and the other perpendicular to the incident beam. Several peaks are visible, indicating vibrational modes of the azide ion.
extraction_notes: The graph does not have a visible title. Peak assignments are based on typical azide ion vibrations.
